roles.allowedUse: Research training with aligned input and target audio pairs.
roles.disallowedUse: Commercial model release without item-level rights, source identity, split, and quality evidence.

roles.allowedUse: Create aligned unmastered/mastered pairs from stems or clean sources using documented processing recipes.
roles.disallowedUse: Claim real pre-master performance from synthetic variants alone.

roles.allowedUse: Pretrain low-level spectral, dynamics, or reconstruction behavior before supervised mastering research.
roles.disallowedUse: Use as sole evidence for mastering quality.

roles.allowedUse: Estimate genre, loudness, spectral, or quality distributions for target selection and balancing.
roles.disallowedUse: Supervised input-target training unless degraded inputs are generated and rights are captured.

roles.allowedUse: Calibrate objective metrics and artifact sensitivity against subjective scores.
roles.disallowedUse: Training the mastering model unless a later plan explicitly approves that use.

roles.allowedUse: Test loaders, schemas, split logic, and rendering workflows with non-release data.
Track a dataset while unresolved access, license, or metadata questions remain.
Document why a source is excluded.
roles.disallowedUse: Any training, validation, benchmarking, or data-derived model artifact use.
